snippet.title: மே 6 முதல் அரசு அறிவித்த 20 முக்கிய கட்டுப்பாடுகள் | Tamil Nadu Extends Lockdown Till May 20
snippet.description:
மே 6 முதல் அரசு அறிவித்த 20 முக்கிய கட்டுப்பாடுகள் | Tamil Nadu Extends Lockdown Till May 20
#LockdownExtends #TNLockdown #SathiyamNews

மே 6 முதல் மளிகை, காய்கறிக் கடைகள் நண்பகல் 12 மணி வரை மட்டுமே இயங்க அனுமதி: தமிழக அரசு அறிவிப்பு
நோய்த்தொற்று அறிகுறிகள் தென்பட்டவுடன், பொதுமக்கள் உடனே அருகிலுள்ள மருத்துவமனைகளை நாடி மருத்துவ ஆலோசனை / சிகிச்சை பெற வேண்டும். பொதுமக்கள் அரசின் முயற்சிகளுக்கு முழு ஒத்துழைப்பு நல்க வேண்டுமென அரசு கேட்டுக் கொள்கிறது”.

To Know the Live and Breaking news at the earliest on your convenience we are here to serve you. #SathiyamNews

About Sathiyam News :
Sathiyam also offers news based investigative shows such as Urakka Solvoem, Kuttram Kuttramae, discussion shows such as Sathiyam Saathiyamae, Kelvi Kanaigal & Adaiyaalam, public interest shows such as Pasumarathaani, Ivar Yaar, Uzhavan & Urimai Kural, satirical shows such as Mic Mayaandi and history based shows such as Varalaattril Indru & Varalaaru Pesukirathu.
We as a company have passion to reach out to the Tamil speaking population world over with the honest and responsible presentation of news and current affairs that reflects the true spirit of journalism and reported with authenticity, clarity and definitive conviction. We believe that a decision made by individuals in the society who have access to information that is truthful and unbiased has the potential to impact and change the society at large. All the broadcasts of Sathiyam Television will express news in a manner that is true, integral, understandable and devoid of sensationalism or slander of any kind. All broadcasts of Sathiyam Television have a singular focus of arming the viewer with the truth that would empower them to make a decision by themselves. This change we believe in turn will prepare our Nation to face the reality of truth and motivate its citizens to operate based on their individual decision.

Sathiyam is aiming to become a strong and competitive channel in the GEC space of Tamil Television scenario. Sathiyam’s biggest strength is its people. The channel has some of the best talent on its rolls. A clear vision backed by the best brains gives Sathiyam a clear cut edge in the crowded Tamil TV landscape.

As for DTH, Sathiyam is available in all leading DTH & other OTT  platforms  Sathiyam TV is also available for viewership in the Bangalore, Mysore, Hubli & Dharwad areas of Karnataka and in Mumbai & Kolkata through terrestrial means, apart from a 24X7 web streaming at www.sathiyam.tv

Sathiyam has also ventured into offering media based vocational education and training through its educational arm, Sathiyam Academy. Apart from these, Sathiyam runs a matrimonial service by the name MY BEST COMPANION.

snippet.title: They discharged me from the hospital - Part 2
snippet.description:
Thank you for sending me all your overwhelming love and support. While I was miserable, one of the few things that cracked a smile on my face was interacting with you all through this vlog. Thank you for getting my mind off of things. 
Thank you for giving me the strength to carry on, no matter what, through the kind words you expressed in the comments. Thank you from the bottom of my heart for always having my back. I don’t think I can ever hope to repay you. 

My Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/priyankapdeshpande/?hl=en

#ThankYouMakkale #StaySafe #IamBack

snippet.title: I got admitted to the hospital - Part 1
snippet.description:
Makkale.. I was not feeling well and got admitted to the hospital. The whole hospital scene was really depressing. Vlogging from the hospital bed and staying positive helped me recover faster 😛 A positive attitude can recreate your reality. 

The times are tough, everyone is in some version of covid crises directly or indirectly. Just stick around and stay positive. #ThisTooShallPass #StayStrong #StaySafe

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/priyankapdeshpande/?hl=en

snippet.title: Strengthen The Lungs | Day 3 of 10 Days Breath And Meditation Journey With Gurudev
snippet.description:
Strengthen The Lungs | Day 3 of 10 Days Breath And Meditation Journey With Gurudev

Sign up and receive updates of this journey via WhatsApp on http://aoliv.in/10days

We take thousands of breaths each day and inhale thousands of liters of air. But, if our body isn't optimized and we aren't breathing properly then the lungs aren't able to take in as many nutrients as they can. By learning the breathing exercises on the Breathing and Meditation challenge, you can give your respiratory system a much-needed boost to tackle the COVID-19 virus and any other ailments that might come your way.

The meditation led by Gurudev Sri Sri Ravi Shankar will further relax the mind and get rid of the anxiety and despair that we are going through on a daily basis.

Invigorate your body and mind by learning powerful processes on the Online Meditation and Breath Workshop: 👉🏽 https://aolf.in/ytonlinehp

About Gurudev Sri Sri Ravi Shankar

Gurudev Sri Sri Ravi Shankar is a world-renowned humanitarian, spiritual leader, and an ambassador of peace and human values. Through his life and work, Gurudev has inspired millions around the world with a vision of a stress-free and violence-free world.
Gurudev founded The Art of Living, a non-profit organization that is engaged in stress-management and service initiatives. The programs designed by Gurudev empower people with techniques and tools to live a deeper and blissful life.

#GurudevSriSriRaviShankar #ArtofLiving #BreathHeals

hi.description:
फेफड़ों को मजबूत बनाना | गुरुदेव के साथ 10 दिन की सांस और ध्यान यात्रा के दिन 3

 साइन अप करें और http://aoliv.in/10days पर व्हाट्सएप के माध्यम से इस यात्रा के अपडेट प्राप्त करें

 हम हर दिन हजारों सांसें लेते हैं और हजारों लीटर हवा अंदर लेते हैं। लेकिन, यदि हमारा शरीर अनुकूलित नहीं है और हम ठीक से सांस नहीं ले रहे हैं, तो फेफड़े उतने पोषक तत्वों को लेने में सक्षम नहीं हैं, जितना वे कर सकते हैं। श्वास और ध्यान चुनौती पर श्वास अभ्यास सीखकर, आप अपने श्वसन तंत्र को COVID-19 वायरस और किसी भी अन्य बीमारी से निपटने के लिए एक बहुत ही आवश्यक बढ़ावा दे सकते हैं जो आपके रास्ते में आ सकती है।

 गुरुदेव श्री श्री रविशंकर के नेतृत्व में किए गए ध्यान से मन को आराम मिलेगा और हम उस चिंता और निराशा से छुटकारा पाएंगे जो हम दैनिक आधार पर कर रहे हैं।

 ऑनलाइन मेडिटेशन और बर्थ वर्कशॉप पर शक्तिशाली प्रक्रियाएं सीखकर अपने शरीर और दिमाग को मजबूत करें:

 गुरुदेव श्री श्री रविशंकर के बारे में

 गुरुदेव श्री श्री रविशंकर विश्व प्रसिद्ध मानवतावादी, आध्यात्मिक नेता और शांति और मानवीय मूल्यों के राजदूत हैं। अपने जीवन और कार्य के माध्यम से, गुरुदेव ने दुनिया भर में लाखों लोगों को एक तनाव-मुक्त और हिंसा-मुक्त दुनिया की दृष्टि से प्रेरित किया।
 गुरुदेव ने द आर्ट ऑफ लिविंग की स्थापना की, जो एक गैर-लाभकारी संगठन है जो तनाव-प्रबंधन और सेवा की पहल में लगा हुआ है। गुरुदेव द्वारा डिजाइन किए गए कार्यक्रम लोगों को तकनीकों और उपकरणों के साथ एक गहन और आनंदित जीवन जीने के लिए सशक्त बनाते हैं।

 # गुरुदेव श्रीश्री रविशंकर

snippet.description:
Become a part of MI One Family. Like, Comment and Subscribe and make sure to click on the notifications icon.

Watch Kieron Pollard enter the Mumbai Indians dressing after playing a crucial part in the team's successful chase against the Chennai Super Kings during the IPL 2021 in Delhi. Polly was handy with the ball picking 2 wickets as well as destructive with the bat as he hit an unbeaten 87*. Check out what he had to say and how the team congratulated in this post-match dressing room team reaction.

किंवा ९१३६८२२२२४ या नंबर वर व्हॉटसऍप मेसेज करा

https://youtu.be/9Db_owqWJe4

Thikasaniche maskat is a Konkani breakfast recipe. This is a very easy and simple recipe. It is made from wheat flour. It gets nice net and turns out crispy. You can also can this ghavane, or dhiradi or pole. This is a very healthy and quick recipe. It can be made from very few ingredients those are easily available in your pantry. You can try this recipe at home and drop a comment for me. Do not forget to like, share and subscribe.

Ingredients:
• 1 cup Wheat flour
• 1/4 tsp Cumin seeds
• 1/4 tsp Carom seeds / Ajwain
• Finely chopped Green chili
• 2 tsp shredded fresh Coconut
• 1/4 tsp Turmeric powder
• Salt to taste
• Water
• Finely chopped Coriander leaves
• Oil

Method:
• In a bowl take wheat flour, cumin seeds, ajwain, green chili, fresh coconut, turmeric powder, 
  salt and mix everything well together. 
• Add a little water at a time to make a little runny batter like dosa batter. 
• No lumps of wheat flour should be formed. 
• Add coriander leaves and mix well. 
• Heat up a pan on medium heat and spread oil on it. 
• Mix the batter well once transfer on the pan. 
• Spread it little and roast until lower side gets nice golden color. 
• When lower side gets nice golden color spread a little oil on upper side and flip maskat over 
  carefully. 
• When lower side also gets nice golden color, transfer the masakt into a dish. 
• Thiksaniche maskat is all ready.
• You can serve maskat with coconut chutney.

Thikasaniche maskat is a Konkani breakfast recipe. This is a very easy and simple recipe. It is made from wheat flour. It gets nice net and turns out crispy. You can also can this ghavane, or dhiradi or pole. This is a very healthy and quick recipe. It can be made from very few ingredients those are easily available in your pantry. You can try this recipe at home and drop a comment for me. Do not forget to like, share and subscribe.

Ingredients:
• 1 cup Wheat flour
• 1/4 tsp Cumin seeds
• 1/4 tsp Carom seeds / Ajwain
• Finely chopped Green chili
• 2 tsp shredded fresh Coconut
• 1/4 tsp Turmeric powder
• Salt to taste
• Water
• Finely chopped Coriander leaves
• Oil

Method:
• In a bowl take wheat flour, cumin seeds, ajwain, green chili, fresh coconut, turmeric powder, 
  salt and mix everything well together. 
• Add a little water at a time to make a little runny batter like dosa batter. 
• No lumps of wheat flour should be formed. 
• Add coriander leaves and mix well. 
• Heat up a pan on medium heat and spread oil on it. 
• Mix the batter well once transfer on the pan. 
• Spread it little and roast until lower side gets nice golden color. 
• When lower side gets nice golden color spread a little oil on upper side and flip maskat over 
  carefully. 
• When lower side also gets nice golden color, transfer the masakt into a dish. 
• Thiksaniche maskat is all ready.
• You can serve maskat with coconut chutney.

hi.description:
सांस की तकलीफ बढ़ाने का अधिकार | गुरुदेव के साथ 10 दिन की सांस और ध्यान यात्रा के दिन 2

 यहां ऑनलाइन मेडिटेशन और बर्थ वर्कशॉप कर दुनिया के सबसे शक्तिशाली सांस लेने के व्यायाम को जानें:

 ज्यादातर लोग नहीं जानते कि वे अपने फेफड़ों की क्षमता का केवल 33% उपयोग कर रहे हैं। इसे योगिक श्वास या गहरी केंद्रित श्वास सीखकर बढ़ाया जा सकता है। श्वास और ध्यान चुनौती के दिन 2 पर, हम आपको शक्तिशाली साँस लेने के व्यायाम लाते हैं जो ऑक्सीजन के लिए आपके फेफड़ों की क्षमता को बढ़ा सकते हैं। साँस लेने के व्यायाम और ध्यान का संयोजन आपके शरीर को पुनर्जीवित करेगा और आपके दिमाग को आराम देगा।

 दुनिया में सबसे शक्तिशाली श्वास और ध्यान अभ्यास सीखकर अपनी ऑक्सीजन क्षमता का अनुकूलन करें, ऑनलाइन ध्यान और सांस लेने की क्रिया पर सुदर्शन क्रिया: a https://aolf.in/ytonlinehp

 गुरुदेव श्री श्री रविशंकर के बारे में

 गुरुदेव श्री श्री रविशंकर विश्व प्रसिद्ध मानवतावादी, आध्यात्मिक नेता और शांति और मानवीय मूल्यों के राजदूत हैं। अपने जीवन और कार्य के माध्यम से, गुरुदेव ने दुनिया भर में लाखों लोगों को एक तनाव-मुक्त और हिंसा-मुक्त दुनिया की दृष्टि से प्रेरित किया।
 गुरुदेव ने द आर्ट ऑफ लिविंग की स्थापना की, जो एक गैर-लाभकारी संगठन है जो तनाव-प्रबंधन और सेवा की पहल में लगा हुआ है। गुरुदेव द्वारा डिजाइन किए गए कार्यक्रम लोगों को तकनीकों और उपकरणों के साथ एक गहन और आनंदित जीवन जीने के लिए सशक्त बनाते हैं।

snippet.title: The Pet Peeves Song (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
Our first ever MUSIC VIDEO lol !
Stay tuned for our behind the scenes video dropping next week!
► Thanks for subscribing! - http://bit.ly/SubDudePerfect

Song Writer: Ben Rogers
Vocals: Dude Perfect
Song Mixer: Aaron Kelley
Song produced at: Luminous Sound, Dallas TX
-------------------------------------------
LYRICS:
Dude Perfect -- Yas Yas – haha
Why are you talking like that?
Recording a lit video, bro – A song about Pet Peeves, brah
That’s interesting because my #1 pet peeve is people overusing bro and brah
I hear you brah… but Pet Peeves are makin my life a grind, bro
You’re actually grindin on my nerves, like right now
 
Man, listen… I’mma break it down with precision
The mission, is to expose pet peeve conditions
I’ll list em, like couples, who over-say bae
Or people goin around saying that’s cray cray
 
And I gotta be honest -- I was really hopin
You could stop eating with your mouth wide open
And try Scopin, please back up off me
Breath smellin like burnt dog poop and coffee
 
And stop these, baby-name catastrophes
Like Ransom, Melanomia and ABCDE
And I’m sick of passin these dogs that bark a lot
Why are you leaving grocery carts in a parkin lot?
 
And whether it’s dark or not, why oh why oh why oh why
Are you takin TWO parkin spots?
Cause you’re drivin nuts, like missin one foot puts
I think I’m hatin your guts, it’s simply too much

CHORUS
Pet Peeves are on my mind
Makin my life a grind
Pet Peeves are on my mind
Makin my life, my life, my life, OH
Pet Peeves are on my mind
Makin my life a grind
Pet Peeves are on my mind
A grind, a grind, a grind, a grind OH

It happens every day, why must it be this way?
Another couple throwin down excessive PDA
And what am I supposed to do? 
It always lights my fuse
When I squeeze mustard, but all I get is mustard juice
 
Dude Perfect. Listen up, it will be worth it.
I can’t stand it when pet peeves surface
Like opening a cereal bag and it explodes
Or no toilet paper over by the commode
 
Or someone breaking the code, of eatin food off my plate
They didn’t order no fries, but all of mine they ate
I can’t stand human zombies in a trance with their phone
I can’t stand human beings wearing too much cologne
 
I can’t stand close talkers, people all in my face
Or people talkin in a movie, this is such a disgrace
Or people walking round town loud talkin their phone
I wanna get up in their face and say I do not condone
 
I hate sign stealin cheaters
One-up story tellers
Constant interrupters
BO body smellers

LYRICS:
Dude Perfect -- Yas Yas – haha
Why are you talking like that?
Recording a lit video, bro – A song about Pet Peeves, brah
That’s interesting because my #1 pet peeve is people overusing bro and brah
I hear you brah… but Pet Peeves are makin my life a grind, bro
You’re actually grindin on my nerves, like right now
 
Man, listen… I’mma break it down with precision
The mission, is to expose pet peeve conditions
I’ll list em, like couples, who over-say bae
Or people goin around saying that’s cray cray
 
And I gotta be honest -- I was really hopin
You could stop eating with your mouth wide open
And try Scopin, please back up off me
Breath smellin like burnt dog poop and coffee
 
And stop these, baby-name catastrophes
Like Ransom, Melanomia and ABCDE
And I’m sick of passin these dogs that bark a lot
Why are you leaving grocery carts in a parkin lot?
 
And whether it’s dark or not, why oh why oh why oh why
Are you takin TWO parkin spots?
Cause you’re drivin nuts, like missin one foot puts
I think I’m hatin your guts, it’s simply too much

CHORUS
Pet Peeves are on my mind
Makin my life a grind
Pet Peeves are on my mind
Makin my life, my life, my life, OH
Pet Peeves are on my mind
Makin my life a grind
Pet Peeves are on my mind
A grind, a grind, a grind, a grind OH

It happens every day, why must it be this way?
Another couple throwin down excessive PDA
And what am I supposed to do? 
It always lights my fuse
When I squeeze mustard, but all I get is mustard juice
 
Dude Perfect. Listen up, it will be worth it.
I can’t stand it when pet peeves surface
Like opening a cereal bag and it explodes
Or no toilet paper over by the commode
 
Or someone breaking the code, of eatin food off my plate
They didn’t order no fries, but all of mine they ate
I can’t stand human zombies in a trance with their phone
I can’t stand human beings wearing too much cologne
 
I can’t stand close talkers, people all in my face
Or people talkin in a movie, this is such a disgrace
Or people walking round town loud talkin their phone
I wanna get up in their face and say I do not condone
 
I hate sign stealin cheaters
One-up story tellers
Constant interrupters
BO body smellers
Because you’re driving me nuts, like missin one foot puts
I think I’m hatin your guts, it’s simply too much
 
CHORUS

It happens every day, I can’t believe when I see
Someone refuse to cover their mouth when they have to sneeze
And What am I supposed to do – how am I supposed to breathe?
When someone says suppoably instead of supposedly

snippet.title: Free Fire in Real Life😳🔥Criminal Chrono & Evil Kelly The Villain !!
snippet.description:
FreeFire's First Real Life Short Film in Indian Community.

This time we have done a live-action FreeFire shoot with the help of @Havok Nation - The Gamers Destination . 

VFX Artist - https://youtu.be/Ug_DsN61Q8U

Summary - The story of this video goes like this...
The Real Bounty Hunter Ayush was kidnapped by Super Villian and tried to erase his super skills and memory, Sanam somehow rescued Ayush but Supervillain tracked his location and tried to kill him again.

PC Mod and Shoot Exceccution by Havok Nation 
- https://www.instagram.com/havoknationin/
Shoot by Abhijeet Kalamkar and Vishal Jadhav
- https://www.instagram.com/abhijeet.k.photography/
- https://www.instagram.com/vishal8jadhav/
VFX by Jai Gurjar (Shortpants)
- https://www.instagram.com/shortpants_vfx/
Special Cast Kelly by Vijaya Singha
- https://www.instagram.com/vijaya_0717/

Cast:
Team UG - Ayush and Sanam 
Team Super Villain - Pramod and Sameer (Money Heist), Vijaya Singha (Kelly), Vishal Jadhav (Bot)

snippet.title: திடீரென எதிர் வீட்டுக்கு சென்று திக்குமுக்காட வைத்த மு.க.ஸ்டாலின்|MK Stalin| DMK
snippet.description:
கோபாலபுரத்திலுள்ள தனது தாயாரை சந்தித்து வாழ்த்துப் பெற்றார் மு.க.ஸ்டாலின்

தமிழகத்தில் திமுக ஆட்சியைக் கைப்பற்றியுள்ள நிலையில், தாயாரிடம் மு.க.ஸ்டாலின் வாழ்த்து

தாயார் வீட்டுக்கு எதிரே இருந்த குடும்ப நண்பர் வீட்டுக்குச் சென்றும் வாழ்த்துப் பெற்றுக் கொண்டார்

ஸ்டாலின் திடீர் வருகையால் எதிர் வீட்டுக்காரர்கள் மகிழ்ச்சியில் திக்குமுக்காடினர்

snippet.title: Healing Through Breath | Day 1 of 10 Days Breath And Meditation Journey With Gurudev
snippet.description:
Healing Through Breath | Day 1 of 10 Days Breath And Meditation Journey With Gurudev

Join our free 3-Day personalised Covid care program with our teachers to support - prevention, isolation care and recovery from Covid through Meditation, Breath and Yoga - http://aoliv.in/fightcorona

It took a global pandemic to make the world realize that our breath is the most important aspect of our being. With the second wave of COVID-19 ravaging the lives of thousands of people and the country's health infrastructure, it is time we take the responsibility of our lungs into our own hands.

The 10-Day breathing and meditation challenge brings you powerful breathing exercises that optimize your body's oxygen capacity and invigorating meditations that will completely relax your mind. Today, we will learn the Art of Breathing Right. We have been on this planet for decades but still, we don't know how to breathe in the right manner. Let's learn this basic thing today and follow it up with energizing exercises and meditation.

Join the 10 Day Breath and Meditation Journey on http://aoliv.in/10days

About Gurudev Sri Sri Ravi Shankar

Gurudev Sri Sri Ravi Shankar is a world-renowned humanitarian, spiritual leader, and ambassador of peace and human values. Through his life and work, Gurudev has inspired millions around the world with a vision of a stress-free and violence-free world.
Gurudev founded The Art of Living, a non-profit organization that is engaged in stress-management and service initiatives. The programs designed by Gurudev empower people with techniques and tools to live a deeper and blissful life.

#GurudevSriSriRaviShankar #ArtofLiving #BreathHeals

hi.title: सांस के माध्यम से हीलिंग | गुरुदेव के साथ 10 दिन की सांस और ध्यान की यात्रा 1 दिन
hi.description:
सांस के माध्यम से हीलिंग | गुरुदेव के साथ 10 दिन की सांस और ध्यान की यात्रा 1 दिन

 हमारे शिक्षकों के साथ हमारे निशुल्क 3-दिवसीय व्यक्तिगत कोविद देखभाल कार्यक्रम में शामिल हों - ध्यान, सांस और योग के माध्यम से कोविद से रोकथाम, अलगाव देखभाल और वसूली - http://aoliv.in/fightcorona

 दुनिया को यह एहसास दिलाने के लिए एक वैश्विक महामारी का सामना करना पड़ा कि हमारी सांस हमारे अस्तित्व का सबसे महत्वपूर्ण पहलू है। COVID-19 की दूसरी लहर से हजारों लोगों के जीवन और देश के स्वास्थ्य के बुनियादी ढांचे को नुकसान पहुंचा रहा है, यह समय है जब हम अपने फेफड़ों की जिम्मेदारी अपने हाथों में लेते हैं।

 10-दिवसीय श्वास और ध्यान चुनौती आपको शक्तिशाली साँस लेने के व्यायाम लाती है जो आपके शरीर की ऑक्सीजन क्षमता को अनुकूलित करती है और ध्यान को शांत करती है जो आपके दिमाग को पूरी तरह से शांत कर देती है। आज, हम आर्ट ऑफ़ ब्रीथिंग राइट सीखेंगे। हम इस ग्रह पर दशकों से हैं, लेकिन फिर भी, हम नहीं जानते कि कैसे सही तरीके से साँस लेना है। आइए आज इस मूल बात को सीखें और इसे व्यायाम और ध्यान के साथ अपनाएं।

 Http://aoliv.in/10days पर 10 दिवसीय सांस और ध्यान यात्रा में शामिल हों

 गुरुदेव श्री श्री रविशंकर के बारे में

 गुरुदेव श्री श्री रविशंकर विश्व प्रसिद्ध मानवतावादी, आध्यात्मिक नेता और शांति और मानवीय मूल्यों के राजदूत हैं। अपने जीवन और कार्य के माध्यम से, गुरुदेव ने दुनिया भर में लाखों लोगों को एक तनाव-मुक्त और हिंसा-मुक्त दुनिया की दृष्टि से प्रेरित किया।
 गुरुदेव ने द आर्ट ऑफ लिविंग की स्थापना की, जो एक गैर-लाभकारी संगठन है जो तनाव-प्रबंधन और सेवा की पहल में लगा हुआ है। गुरुदेव द्वारा डिजाइन किए गए कार्यक्रम लोगों को तकनीकों और उपकरणों के साथ एक गहन और आनंदित जीवन जीने के लिए सशक्त बनाते हैं।

 # गुरुदेव श्रीश्री रविशंकर

snippet.title: Gaon ki yaad | गाँव की याद - Hansraj raghuwanshi
snippet.description:
भोलेनाथ सब अच्छा करेंगे 🙏

महामारी फैलने का एक ही कारण है - प्रकृति के साथ छेड़ छाड़ । जिसका भुगतान हम सब को करना पड़ रहा है। महामारी के शिकंजे में माता, पिता, भाई, बहन और छोटे छोटे बच्चे भी आ गए हैं। यह सब खबरें सुन कर ह्रदय बहुत दुखी होता है। आप सब से मेरी विनती है के आप सब अपना और अपनों का ख्याल रखें। भोले बाबा का नाम जप करते रहें और जो लोग इस सब का नाजायज़ फायदा उठा रहे हैं उनसे बचें और ऐसे मुश्किल समय में एक दूसरे के सहायक बनें।
जयशंकरमहाराज❤️

#Radhe​​ #SalmanKhan​

Directed by Prabhudeva 
Produced by Salma Khan, Reel Life Pvt.Ltd

snippet.title: How to Start Class 11th? The Journey of becoming an IITian & Doctor !!! ARJUNA Batch on PW App.
snippet.description:
Complete Class 11th NCERT Syllabus + JEE/NEET Preparation . 🎯

Batch Exclusive on PW APP(http://bit.ly/3ru9Agh)

🔴 Details About The Batch.

✒️ We will cover PCM/PCB for Class 11 and JEE/NEET

✒️  Complete LIVE CLASSES of each subject(Arjunaas can see recorded lecture if He/She misses the Live Class).
⚛️ JEE Lecture Plan:https://bit.ly/3sNOyci

🌀 NEET Lecture Plan:https://bit.ly/3dJ2EHA


✒️ Study Materials that will boost up your preparation. It includes complete detailed theory and level wise exercises ( Hard Copy of the study material will be delivered at your home ).

✒️ Daily Practice Problems and Detailed Video Solutions of DPP will be provided.

✒️ Special Classes after each chapter completion with NCERT Discussion and Practice Problem Sessions.

✒️ Incase you missed the live class you can see its recording any number of times.

✒️ PDF Notes of each Class .

✒️ Test after every 21 days to help students improve their problem solving skills. It includes Part Test + Full Test
🔘 JEE TEST SCHEDULE :https://bit.ly/3tMJtSU
🔘 NEET TEST SCHEDULE :https://bit.ly/3nfR8Xn


✒️ Syllabus Completion by the end of the January 2022 with topic-wise discussion of last 10 year problems of JEE/NEET

✒️ The complete course will be accessible to all the student until JEE/NEET 2023

--------------------------------------------------
🔴 OFFLINE KA FEEL!!!

•Printed Study Material for Arjuna JEE/NEET Package ( You can order on Physics Wallah App)
ClassXI-JEE Study Material Sample:
Physics:https://bit.ly/3xpgkzs
Chemistry:https://bit.ly/3sKPmOZ
Mathematics:https://bit.ly/3gO9QUX

Class XI-NEET Study Material Sample:
Physics:https://bit.ly/3aBqRO4
Chemistry:https://bit.ly/2Phozw0
Biology:https://bit.ly/3gBAm3B

1) Package contains a total of 15 books. Each subject (PCM/PCB) will be having 4 modules and one solution booklet (100% solutions of all problems).

2) Detailed and catchy theory of each chapter with illustrative examples helping students in concept building.

3) Critical topics are highlighted in the book for keeping them in the spotlight.

4) Extra key points are mentioned in the book which gives a competitive edge over other books.

5) Books consist of MCQs of different levels of difficulty to enhance problem solving techniques.

6) Detailed answers for every question for better understanding.

7) Tips and tricks for speed and skill enhancement of students.

📝For more Details, Visit PhysicsWallah App(http://bit.ly/3ru9Agh)

-------------------------------------------
👉 Competition Wallah : https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCD16eo98AXl-9T61Xd711kQ

👉 PhysicsWallah Foundation-9th & 10th : https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCphU2bAGmw304CFAzy0Enuw


✒️ PHYSICS WALLAH SOCIAL MEDIA PROFILES :

👉 Twitter : https://twitter.com/PhysicswallahAP?s=20

👉 Instagram : https://www.instagram.com/physicswallah/ 

👉 Facebook : https://www.facebook.com/physicswallah

PhysicsWallah App on Google Play Store : http://bit.ly/3ru9Agh

snippet.title: ऑक्सीजन और इम्युनिटी बढ़ाने का आसान तरीका |  Enhance Immunity and Oxygen Levels | Sadhguru Hindi
snippet.description:
सरल योग अभ्यास सीखें - सिंह क्रिया और साष्टांग - सद्गुरु ने यह अभ्यास, इम्युनिटी बढ़ाने और ऑक्सीजन के स्तर को बढ़ाने के लिए डिज़ाइन किए हैं।
इन अभ्यासों के नियम:

1. साष्टांग और मकरासन को खाली पेट की स्थिति में करना चाहिए।

यानि, नीचे दिए निर्देशों के अनुसार कुछ समय रूककर यह दोनों अभ्यास करें:
- भरपेट भोजन करने के बाद 4 घंटे रुकें
- फल या कुछ बिस्कुट जैसा नाश्ता करने के बाद 2.5 घंटे रुकें
- चाय, कॉफी या पानी के अलावा कुछ भी पीने के बाद 1.5 घंटे रुकें
- पानी कभी भी पीया जा सकता है। पानी पीने पर कोई रोक नहीं है।

2. गर्भवती महिलाओं को साष्टांग या मकरासन नहीं करना चाहिए। हालांकि, वे सिंह क्रिया कर सकती हैं।

English Video:

एक योगी, युगदृष्टा, मानवतावादी, सद्‌गुरु एक आधुनिक गुरु हैं, जिनको योग के प्राचीन विज्ञान पर पूर्ण अधिकार है। विश्व शांति और खुशहाली की दिशा में निरंतर काम कर रहे सद्‌गुरु के रूपांतरणकारी कार्यक्रमों से दुनिया के करोडों लोगों को एक नई दिशा मिली है। दुनिया भर में लाखों लोगों को आनंद के मार्ग में दीक्षित किया गया है। 

सद्‌गुरु एप्प डाउनलोड करें 📲
http://onelink.to/sadhguru__app

ईशा फाउंडेशन हिंदी ब्लॉग
http://isha.sadhguru.org/hindi

सद्‌गुरु का ओफ़िशिअल हिंदी फेसबुक चैनल
http://www.facebook.com/SadhguruHindi

सद्‌गुरु का ओफ़िशिअल हिंदी Telegram ग्रुप जॉइन करें 
https://t.me/joinchat/Md1ldBSkRhCIANVu80OSDA

सद्‌गुरु का नि:शुल्क ध्यान ईशा क्रिया सीखने के लिए:
http://hindi.ishakriya.com

snippet.title: Parents During Board Exams | School Life | Veyilon Entertainment
snippet.description:

When it's time for the board exams you know how exhausting one could get having to deal with all those extra specials classes and kinds of stuff. 
After facing all these at school and when you finally get back home, that's when the real screwing starts. 

Let's watch how torturous it could get when the parents take charge in preparing their kids, like a kick start at the back early in the morning, late-night studies, no playtime outside, TVs plugged out, etc...

When it's time for the board exams you know how exhausting one could get having to deal with all those extra specials classes and kinds of stuff. 
After facing all these at school and when you finally get back home, that's when the real screwing starts. 

Let's watch how torturous it could get when the parents take charge in preparing their kids, like a kick start at the back early in the morning, late-night studies, no playtime outside, TVs plugged out, etc...

snippet.title: Swaragini | स्वरागिनी | Episode 217
snippet.description:
While Ragini is showing of her power, Lakshya appears drunk and humiliates her. Swara is trying to find the singer who came at the party the other day.

#ColorsRishtey #Swaragini

To subscribe this channel go to: https://www.youtube.com/c/ColorsRishtey1/featured

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

To go to the show playlist please click: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLX18mvVSh-bwL5H8eIQ6w51VWKyjzA0oU

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/colorsrishteyindia
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/rishteytv/

'Swaragini' is a story about Swara and Ragini, who belong to warring families, but later realise that they are in fact half-sisters. Out of sheer hatred, Ragini manipulates Swara's love interest, Lakshaya into marriage, while Swara ends up getting married to Lakshya's brother, Sanskar. Once he learns the truth, Sanskar swears to reunite Swara with Lakshya, but in turn falls in love with her. Will Swara choose her lover over her husband, or will the sanctity of holy matrimony triumph?

snippet.title: Tu Bhi Sataya Jayega (Official Video) Vishal Mishra | Aly Goni, Jasmin Bhasin | VYRL Originals
snippet.description:
VYRL Originals presents the multi award-winning singer-composer Vishal Mishra’s Tu Bhi Sataya Jayega featuring Bigg Boss fame and popular couple Aly Goni and Jasmin Bhasin. The song has been written by Vishal Mishra and Kaushal Kishore narrating this story from a female perspective. The Music Video has been directed by Navjit Buttar and has been shot in a grand scale. Watch Aly & Jasmin in a never before seen avatar, showcasing skilfully the pain and anguish of a toxic relationship. You are in for a surprise as the story unfolds to a shocking end. 

#VYRLOriginals #TuBhiSatayaJayega #AlyJasmin

snippet.title: TVF's Aspirants | Web Series | Episode 4 | Plan B Kya Hai?
snippet.description:
Like the Episode? Rate us on IMDb - https://www.imdb.com/title/tt14392248/

UPSC is one of the toughest exams in the world with a success rate of less than 1%. As an Aspirant, you can’t ignore the fact that you might not crack it. Abhilash realizes this after talking to SK and Guri, they tell him everyone needs a Plan B. On the other hand, he is also being pressured by his company to end his sabbatical and join again. What will Abhilash do now? What will be his Plan B?

This examination season, we bring you the story of three friends who reunite to tell us all about UPSC: Pre... Mains... Aur Life. 

Participate in the Unacademy Combat, a weekly scholarship test for UPSC SCE. Use code ASPIRANTS2021 to take the test and compete with peers across the country. Top rankers will also stand a chance to get up to 100% scholarship from a pool worth Rs 1 Crore.
Link - https://unacademy.com/combat/a/KSCGY

Unacademy & The Viral Fever presents ASPIRANTS - A TVF Original Series. 

Credits:
Created by: Arunabh Kumar & Shreyansh Pandey
Directed by: Apoorv Singh Karki 
Written by: Deepesh Sumitra Jagdish 
Produced by: Arunabh Kumar 
Executive Producers: Vijay Koshy, Shreyansh Pandey, Arun Kumar 
Supervising Producers: Haider Ali, Joshna Bhat 
Associate Director: Himali Shah 
D.O.P: Georgy John, Arjun Kukreti 
Editor: Tushar Manocha 
Music: Rohit Sharma 
Background Score: Tusshar Mallek 
Head of Post Production: Gaurav Rungta 
Production Designer: Beeva Mahajan 
Costume Stylist: Yashika Kakkar 
Casting: Ashish Khare, Shiv Chouhan 
Sound Design: Pranit Purao 
Special Mention: Nilotpal Bora for Dhaaga

Music at the Bar: Love U More By Riley & TOMOS
Publishers: Soundcast Music

UPSC fact #91: Satyendra worked as a clerk in the excise department, his marriage was arranged with Aarti. But Aarti ran away a night before their wedding because she found out that she had cleared the PCS exam. Satyendra who was initially heartbroken worked really hard and became an IAS officer. Eventually, Aarti came back into his life and they got married.
PS: It’s a True Story.
-Description Guy.

UPSC is one of the toughest exams in the world with a success rate of less than 1%. As an Aspirant, you can’t ignore the fact that you might not crack it. Abhilash realizes this after talking to SK and Guri, they tell him everyone needs a Plan B. On the other hand, he is also being pressured by his company to end his sabbatical and join again. What will Abhilash do now? What will be his Plan B?

This examination season, we bring you the story of three friends who reunite to tell us all about UPSC: Pre... Mains... Aur Life.

snippet.title: എളുപ്പത്തിൽ ചൂട് ചൂട് സമോസ ഉണ്ടാക്കാം || Easy Chicken Samosa || Lekshmi Nair
snippet.description:
Hello dear friends, this is my 475th Vlog. In this video demonstrate how to make easy easy Chicken Samosa.

How to make Easy Chicken Samosa

Chicken -  250 gms
Kashmiri chilli powder - 1/2 tsp +  1/2 tsp
Pepper powder - 1/2 tsp +   1/2 tsp
Salt( according to taste )
Turmeric powder - 1/4 tsp +   1/4 tsp
Big onion - 3 nos (Finely chopped)
green chillies - 2 - 5 nos (Finely chopped)
Refined oil
Garam Masala powder - 1/2 tsp
Coriander leaves
Maida ( All Purpose Flour ) - 11/2  Cup
Dalda - 11/2  -  2 tbs
Rice flour 

Please share your valuable feedback's through the comment box.
Don't forget to Like, Share and Subscribe. Love you all :)
